revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-1-120

A building or part of a building designed to house operational engines (alternator sets, motors, compressors, etc.).


Note: In German the term Maschinenhaus is used when a separate building is used for this purpose.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Engine room}}
